art_highlights: TEFAF Maastricht 2026 concluded, showcasing 7,000 years of history.
Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 upcoming (March 27-29), featuring a new Samsung Art Store collaboration.
V&A Museum opened 'Schiaparelli: Fashion Becomes Art'.
25th Biennale of Sydney: 'Rememory' exploring memory as an active force.

market_trends.summary: Markets reacting to Middle East geopolitical tensions and mixed economic signals.
key_points: Indian markets surged (Sensex +1,100 points) on hopes of de-escalation.
U.S. indices closed with mild losses; global markets showing choppy behavior.
Oil prices remain volatile, impacting inflation expectations.
Small-cap sectors and cyclical industries (Energy, Materials) are showing relative strength.
